name: overlord
description: Chat-driven access to Overlord ticket protocol workflows with hook-driven activity capture.

interface.shortDescription: Run Overlord ticket workflows from Codex chat
interface.longDescription: Connect Codex to Overlord's local ticket workflow through the existing `ovld protocol` CLI. The plugin bundles workflow skills plus MCP tools for ticket attachment, progress updates, shared context, artifacts, delivery, and follow-up ticket creation.
defaultPrompt: Create an Overlord ticket with the objective 'Implement feature X' and summarize the context before editing code
Find all Overlord tickets with the status 'next-up' and prioritize the most important one
